description: Customer wants to return a delivered item and asks for a prepaid shipping label. The agent cannot generate labels - it must open the return AND ask the merchant for a label URL via ask_operator (classifying as needs_merchant_input), not promise a label it doesn't have, reply without asking, or escalate. Advisory: pairing the return with the ask is a novel two-step judgment; tracked as a quality signal.

messages.contentText: The linen curtains from order #11111 don't match my walls at all. I'd like to return them - could you send me a prepaid shipping label?

simulateToolResults.result: Opened return #11111-R1 (status OPEN) on order 9000011111 for: 1x Linen Curtains. No refund was issued - this only authorizes the customer to send the items back. Tell the customer the return is set up and how to ship the items.

instruction: Set up the customer's return and get them a shipping label.
